zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine De Pateshull於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Sir John De Pateshull20歲，母親Mabilia Grandison18歲。她於1325年與Robert de Tudenham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年6月16日享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine De Pateshull于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲Sir John De Pateshull20岁，母亲Mabilia Grandison18岁。她于1325年与Robert de Tudenham在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1383年6月16日享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine De Pateshull was born about 1310, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John De Pateshull, was 20 and her mother, Mabilia Grandison, was 18. She married Robert de Tudenham in 1325, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 16 June 1383, at the age of 74, and was buried in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine De Pateshull est née environ 1310, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John De Pateshull, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mabilia Grandison, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Tudenham en 1325, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1383, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine De Pateshull um 1310 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Pateshull 20 und ihre Mutter Mabilia Grandison 18. Sie hat 1325 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Robert de Tudenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1383 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine De Pateshull è nata il circa 1310 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John De Pateshull, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mabilia Grandison, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Tudenham nel 1325, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 giugno 1383, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine De Pateshullが約1310年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir John De Pateshullは20歳，母Mabilia Grandisonは18歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでRobert de Tudenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年6月16日に74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine De Pateshull(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Pateshull(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabilia Grandison(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Robert de Tudenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 6월 16일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine De Pateshull nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John De Pateshull, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mabilia Grandison, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Tudenham em 1325, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1383, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine De Pateshull родилась около 1310 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John De Pateshull было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabilia Grandison, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Tudenham в 1325 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 июня 1383 г. в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine De Pateshull nació aproximadamente 1310, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John De Pateshull, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mabilia Grandison, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Robert de Tudenham en 1325, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de junio de 1383, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
